message:
bd-2q3f.3: integrate CGA intersection queries into edge routing

Replace manual AABB checks in find_obstacle_nudge_x/y with CGA-based
segment-rectangle intersection queries. The new cga_routing module
provides precise intersection detection using CgaLineSegment and CgaRect.

- Add cga_routing module with segment_intersects_obstacles, find_first_obstacle_intersection
- Delegate find_obstacle_nudge_x/y to CGA-based find_vertical/horizontal_segment_nudge
- Add 8 tests for CGA routing intersection detection
- Reduces ~55 lines of manual AABB code to ~20 lines of delegation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
